mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS != 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS != 2 AND TYPE = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS != 2 AND TYPE = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 2 AND TRUNC(UPDATED_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD') AS "day", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE CREATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(CREATED_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(CREATED_AT)

SELECT TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'MM/DD') AS "day", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 2 AND UPDATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(UPDATED_AT, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(UPDATED_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(UPDATED_AT)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE STATUS IN ('게시중', '진행중') AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND DEADLINE_AT < SYSDATE AND STATUS = '마감'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE IS_HIDDEN = #{isHidden} AND STATUS != '삭제됨'

SELECT TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD') AS "day", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE CREATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(CREATED_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(CREATED_AT)

SELECT TO_CHAR(DEADLINE_AT, 'MM/DD') AS "day", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE DEADLINE_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND DEADLINE_AT < SYSDATE AND STATUS = '마감' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(DEADLINE_AT, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(DEADLINE_AT)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE TRUNC(CREATED_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND POST_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_POST WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 1 AND POST_STATUS != 'DELETED'

SELECT TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD') AS "day", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_POST WHERE CREATED_AT >= SYSDATE - 30 AND POST_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND IS_HIDDEN = 0 GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'MM/DD'), TRUNC(CREATED_AT) ORDER BY TRUNC(CREATED_AT)

SELECT b.TITLE AS "boardTitle", COUNT(*) AS "count" FROM TBL_POST p JOIN TBL_BOARD b ON p.FK_BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID WHERE p.POST_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND p.IS_HIDDEN = 0 GROUP BY b.BOARD_ID, b.TITLE ORDER BY b.BOARD_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_BOARD b WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBL_POST p WHERE p.FK_BOARD_ID = b.BOARD_ID AND TRUNC(p.CREATED_AT, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') AND p.POST_STATUS != 'DELETED' AND p.IS_HIDDEN = 0 )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_JOB_POSTING WHERE STATUS = '마감'
